lead_profile_text: Sell STL — 7-bed North Somerset property, primarily while on the market. Mike and Louise (wife/partner) both attended. Special offer at 13% management fee applied at meeting.
green_light_trigger_phrases: property on the market — income needed now

top_objections.zac_response: Full fee structure including cleaning costs explained; special offer at 13% + VAT applied

top_questions.text: What are the revenue projections for this property?
top_questions.answer: Revenue projections presented and compared against current position

top_questions.text: What does guest vetting look like?

top_questions.answer: Onboarding process and timeline discussed at meeting

what_moved_them: Special offer at 13% management fee — below standard 15%
Both decision-makers (Mike and Louise) present and aligned at meeting
offer_framing: Special offer applied at 13% + VAT during the meeting itself — reduced from standard 15%
